name: @ttsc/station
description: Standalone TypeScript-Go compiler and runtime workspace.

scripts.experimental: pnpm run package:tgz && pnpm --dir experimental/install start -- --skip-pack
scripts.test: pnpm run build:current && pnpm --filter ttsc test && node scripts/test-go-transformer.cjs && node scripts/test-go-lint.cjs && node scripts/test-go-utility-plugins.cjs && pnpm --dir tests/smoke start && pnpm --dir tests/lint start

author: Jeongho Nam
